raw_message: Hi, I tried logging in this morning and keep getting a 403 error. My account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This started after your update last Tuesday.
core_issue: Customer cannot log in because the platform is returning a 403 error after a recent update.
urgency_signal: Login access is blocked for one user and appears tied to a recent product change.
summary: A customer reports a login failure caused by a 403 error on the account path arcvault.io/user/jsmith. The issue started after last Tuesday's update, so Engineering should verify whether the release introduced an authentication regression.

raw_message: We'd love to see a bulk export feature for our audit logs. We're a compliance-heavy org and this would save us hours every month.
core_issue: Customer is requesting bulk export functionality for audit logs to support compliance workflows.
urgency_signal: This is a non-urgent product enhancement request with clear business value.
summary: The customer is asking for bulk export support for audit logs to reduce recurring compliance work. Product should evaluate the request as a workflow-efficiency feature with clear customer value rather than an operational incident.

raw_message: Invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1,240 but our contract rate is $980/month. Can someone look into this?
core_issue: Customer reports a billing discrepancy between the invoice amount and the contracted monthly rate.
urgency_signal: This is financially sensitive and should be reviewed promptly, but it does not meet the human-escalation threshold.
summary: The customer is disputing invoice #8821 because it charges $1,240 instead of the contracted $980 monthly rate. Billing should verify the contract terms and reconcile the $260 discrepancy with the customer.

raw_message: I'm not sure if this is the right place to ask, but is there a way to set up SSO with Okta? We're evaluating switching our auth provider.
core_issue: Customer is asking whether ArcVault supports SSO setup with Okta during an authentication-provider evaluation.
urgency_signal: This is a technical pre-sales or implementation question without evidence of an active incident.
summary: The customer wants to know whether ArcVault can be configured with Okta for single sign-on as part of an auth-provider evaluation. IT/Security should respond with the current SSO support path and any setup requirements or limitations.

raw_message: Your dashboard stopped loading for us around 2pm EST. Checked our end - it's definitely on yours. Multiple users affected.
core_issue: Customer reports that the dashboard stopped loading around 2pm EST and the issue is affecting multiple users.
urgency_signal: This is urgent because it appears to be a service disruption affecting multiple users.
summary: The customer reports a dashboard outage beginning around 2pm EST and says multiple users are affected. This should be reviewed immediately by a human because it matches the incident criteria and may require coordinated Engineering response.
